guards.name: explore
guards.description: Suggest checking codebase index before deep exploration

guards.name: hazard
guards.description: Warn about known issues in file areas being edited

guards.name: commit-nudge
guards.description: Nudge to commit/push after prolonged editing

guards.name: scope-drift
guards.description: Warn when editing files outside claimed ticket scope

guards.name: compaction
guards.description: Extract events before context compaction

guards.name: stop-check
guards.description: Check for uncommitted/unpushed work before session end

guards.name: subagent-gate
guards.description: Enforce model selection on Explore/Plan subagents

guards.name: push-nudge
guards.description: Nudge to push after git commits when unpushed count or time is high

guards.name: workflow-gate
guards.description: Block ExitPlanMode until review rounds are complete

guards.name: review-tier
guards.description: Suggest plan review with specialist reviewers after plan file write

guards.name: version-check
guards.description: Block push to main when package versions have not been bumped

guards.name: workflow-step-gate
guards.description: Check if current workflow step allows agent_work before editing

guards.name: stale-flows
guards.description: Warn when editing files belonging to a stale flow definition

guards.name: next-action
guards.description: Suggest next actions before session end

guards.name: pr-review
guards.description: Prompt for review workflow after PR creation

guards.name: transcript
guards.description: Append tool call metadata to session transcript

guards.name: branch-before-commit
guards.description: Block git commit on main/master — create a feature branch first

guards.name: worktree-check
guards.description: Block concurrent sessions without worktree isolation

guards.name: sprint-completion
guards.description: Block PR creation when sprint gates are incomplete

guards.name: sprint-completion
guards.description: Block session end when sprint gates are incomplete

guards.name: sprint-completion
guards.description: Auto-detect test pass and mark gate complete

guards.name: worktree-merge
guards.description: Block gh pr merge --delete-branch in worktrees (causes false failure)

guards.name: worktree-self-remove
guards.description: Block git worktree remove when targeting own cwd

guards.name: phase-boundary
guards.description: Block starting sprint in new phase if previous phase cleanup incomplete

guards.name: claim-required
guards.description: Warn when editing code without an active sprint claim

guards.name: post-push
guards.description: Suggest next workflow step after git push

guards.name: session-briefing
guards.description: Inject sprint context on first tool call of session

guards.name: review-stale
guards.description: Warn about scored sprints with missing reviews at session end

guards.name: worktree-reuse
guards.description: Guide agent to reuse existing worktrees instead of recreating

mcpTools.name: search
mcpTools.desc: Discover the SLOPE API — functions, types, constants, flows, and codebase map

params.name: module
params.desc: Filter by module (core, fs, constants, store, flows, inspirations, init, testing, types, map)

mcpTools.name: execute
mcpTools.desc: Run JavaScript in a sandboxed node:vm with the full SLOPE API pre-injected

params.name: code
params.desc: JavaScript code to execute (must return a value)

mcpTools.name: context_search
mcpTools.desc: Semantic code search — returns relevant snippets instead of full files. Falls back to grep without embedding index.

params.name: query
params.desc: Natural language query or code concept to search for

params.name: format
params.desc: Output format: paths, snippets, or full (default: snippets)

mcpTools.name: session_status
mcpTools.desc: Show active sessions and claims from the SLOPE store

mcpTools.name: acquire_claim
mcpTools.desc: Claim a ticket or area for the current sprint

mcpTools.name: check_conflicts
mcpTools.desc: Detect overlapping and adjacent conflicts among active claims

mcpTools.name: store_status
mcpTools.desc: Check store health — schema version, row counts, and error status

mcpTools.name: testing_session_start
mcpTools.desc: Start a manual testing session with git worktree isolation

mcpTools.name: testing_session_finding
mcpTools.desc: Record a finding (bug, observation) during an active testing session

mcpTools.name: testing_session_end
mcpTools.desc: End the active testing session, return summary, cleanup worktree

mcpTools.name: testing_session_status
mcpTools.desc: Show active testing session info and findings

mcpTools.name: testing_plan_status
mcpTools.desc: Show test plan coverage summary: tested, untested, stale, and issue counts per section

mcpTools.name: workflow_next
mcpTools.desc: Get the next step in a workflow execution. Returns step info or completion status.

params.name: execution_id
params.desc: Workflow execution ID (optional if session_id provided)

params.name: session_id
params.desc: Session ID to find active execution

mcpTools.name: workflow_complete
mcpTools.desc: Complete the current step and advance the workflow execution.

mcpTools.name: workflow_status
mcpTools.desc: Show workflow execution status with progress (completed/total steps).

params.name: execution_id
params.desc: Specific execution ID, or omit for all active

metaphors.name: Golf
metaphors.description: The original SLOPE metaphor — sprints are holes, tickets are shots, and your handicap tracks improvement over time.

metaphors.name: Tennis
metaphors.description: Sprints are sets, tickets are points, and your ranking tracks improvement. Aces, volleys, and match strategy.

metaphors.name: Baseball
metaphors.description: Sprints are innings, tickets are at-bats, and your batting average tracks improvement. Home runs, strikeouts, and dugout strategy.

metaphors.name: Gaming
metaphors.description: Sprints are levels, tickets are quests, and your XP tracks improvement. Boss fights, power-ups, and speedruns.

metaphors.name: D&D
metaphors.description: Sprints are encounters, tickets are actions, and your character sheet tracks improvement. Crits, saves, and campaign progress.

metaphors.name: Matrix
metaphors.description: Sprints are simulations, tickets are operations, and your operator rating tracks improvement. Red pills, glitches, and bullettime.

metaphors.name: Agile
metaphors.description: Sprints are sprints, tickets are stories, and velocity tracks improvement. Standups, retros, and continuous delivery.

roles.name: Generalist
roles.description: Default role — no special focus area filtering

roles.name: Architect
roles.description: Cross-package dependencies, API surface, tech debt specialist

roles.name: ML Engineer
roles.description: Model integration, embeddings, and inference specialist

roles.name: Database Engineer
roles.description: Schema design, migrations, query optimization specialist

roles.name: UX Designer
roles.description: User flows, onboarding, accessibility, and progressive disclosure specialist

changes.description: stop-check guard — worktree merge ancestors + untracked files (#255) (#256)
stop hook suggestions non-blocking — don't interrupt background agents (#247)
context compression v2 — dedup explore + commit-nudge guards (#243)
enforce completion conditions on workflow steps (#241)
scaffold workflows on init + post-push fires per push (#228, #238) (#239)
snapshot workflow definition at execution start (#235) (#236)
add plan review phase to workflow definitions (#233)
The Wiring — fix gaps (forceApi, pause/resume, guard metrics, CODEBASE.md) (#231)
make workflow engine the default sprint execution path (#229)
